info.english_meaning: to breatheto live to inhale to be able

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tA varuRagfhItAH paridIrRA anatyaSca prARatyaSca SiSyire' (Sa॰brA॰2.5.2.2) prARatyaH=niHSvasatyaH
'antaScarati rocanA'sya prARAdapAnatI' (f॰10.189.2) apAnatI=nizkrAmantI avyavahitapUrvaM prARAdityukteratrAnitiH kriyAsAmAnyamAha
'adyA mamAra sa hyaH samAna' (f॰10.55.5) samAnetyaniteH samupasfzwasya liwi praTamEkavacane rUpam jijIva jIvitaM leBe SvasanamApetyarTaH
'etAM diSamanavAnantsftvA kumBaM prakzIyAnapekzamARa ehi' (Sa0 brA0 13834) anavAnan=aniSvasan
'imAH prajAH prARatyaScodAnatyaScAntarikzamanucaranti' (Sa0 brA0 3832) udAnatya ucCvAsaM kurvatyaH
'fcA prARihi yajuzA samanihi sAmnodanihi' (SAM0 gf0 9242) udanihi udAnAKyaH SvAsaste prertAmityAha
'apahAya muKamaBiprARan' (satyA0 SrO0 24113) aBiprARan ucCvasan muKamapahAya=muKamanyato nItvA
